rule_metadata.author: Leo Tsaousis (@laripping)
rule_metadata.title: Creation Of Pod In System Namespace

rules.rule_text:
title: Creation Of Pod In System Namespace
id: a80d927d-ac6e-443f-a867-e8d6e3897318
status: test
description: 'Detects deployments of pods within the kube-system namespace, which
  could be intended to imitate system pods.

  System pods, created by controllers such as Deployments or DaemonSets have random
  suffixes in their names.

  Attackers can use this fact and name their backdoor pods as if they were created
  by these controllers to avoid detection.

  Deployment of such a backdoor container e.g. named kube-proxy-bv61v, could be attempted
  in the kube-system namespace alongside the other administrative containers.

  '
references:
- https://microsoft.github.io/Threat-Matrix-for-Kubernetes/techniques/Pod%20or%20container%20name%20similarily/
author: Leo Tsaousis (@laripping)
date: 2024-03-26
tags:
- attack.defense-evasion
- attack.t1036.005
logsource:
  category: application
  product: kubernetes
  service: audit
detection:
  selection:
    verb: create
    objectRef.resource: pods
    objectRef.namespace: kube-system
  condition: selection
falsepositives:
- System components such as daemon-set-controller and kube-scheduler also create pods
  in the kube-system namespace
level: medium
